narrative:
Precinct Dover 1-A (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 525 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
